final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing presentation cover slide for a domestic Chinese fundraising roadshow, announcing GPT-5.5 launch with speaker Sam Altman.

Style/medium: clean corporate PPT cover design, Chinese tech startup aesthetic (similar to Sequoia China or Hillhouse Capital portfolio deck style), modern sans-serif typography
Composition: centered layout with generous white space, title block positioned upper-middle, speaker name at bottom, professional keynote slide proportions
Subject: "GPT-5.5 发布" as main headline, "Sam Altman" as speaker attribution, subtle tech-forward visual element suggesting AI advancement
Scene/backdrop: minimalist gradient background (deep blue to soft gray), subtle geometric patterns or neural network-inspired abstract shapes, no photography
Color palette: professional tech blue as primary, white and light gray as secondary, single accent color (teal or electric blue) for emphasis
Text (verbatim): "GPT-5.5发布" "奥特曼"
Constraints: must follow Chinese domestic roadshow conventions (clean, trustworthy, institutional GP aesthetic); text must be bilingual-ready layout; scalable for 16:9 projection
Avoid: cluttered decoration; cartoonish AI robots; stock photo of people; gradient overload; Western startup clichés (rocket ships, unicorns); Behance trendy 3D renders
